comments.text: A country with an admirable history, and to be honest, even though I’m American, I have a very special affection for the British.

comments.author: @James-dx8qb
comments.text: There's a lot to see and do in England and I guess it's difficult to cover it all in a relatively short video, but you missed a lot of exceptional stuff out. The biggest sins were not mentioning the Yorkshire Dales and Moors, Northumberland, Hadrian's Wall, The Peak District, Lincoln, plus I think Shropshire and Herefordshire are very beautiful too. To be honest, with all the history and culture entwined within the landscape, it would take anyone years to see and digest it all.
